title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 24: Xu Wugui
description: Chapter 24 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 24 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Xu Wugui was given an audience with Marquis Wu of Wei. Marquis Wu spoke words of consolation to him, saying, 'Sir, you are not well! No doubt the hardships of life in the mountain forest have proved too much for you, and that is why you have at last consented to come and see me.'
